tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Steve Nash is one of the greatest point guards in NBA history.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: He won back to back NBA MVP awards in 2005 and 2006.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Nash later became an NBA coach.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Jamal Murray is one of the most exciting young guards in the NBA.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: He helped the Denver Nuggets win the 2023 NBA championship.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Murray is famous for his scoring performances in the playoffs.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander is one of the best young players in the NBA.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: He has been selected to multiple NBA All-Star teams.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: He is known for his smooth scoring ability.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Andrew Wiggins is an athletic forward known for scoring and defense.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: He won the NBA championship with the Golden State Warriors.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Wiggins was the first overall pick in the 2014 NBA draft.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: RJ Barrett is a rising star in the NBA.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: He has been a key player for Canada in international tournaments.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Barrett was one of the top prospects in his draft class.
